problem_text_cn:
3-23 一斜面体静放在光滑水平地面上，斜面倾角$\theta=15^{\circ}$。如图3-26所示，小球从静止自由下落到光滑斜面，下落高度$h=1.60\,\mathrm{m}$，碰撞点距地面高度$H=1.00\,\mathrm{m}$。小球与斜面法向碰撞恢复系数$e=0.60$，碰后斜面体不离地，小球与斜面体的质量比$m/M=0.5$。
(1) 求碰后小球反弹速度和斜面体获得的速度；
(2) 求碰后小球最高位置相对原碰撞点的高度；
(3) 判断小球碰后将落于斜面还是落于地面？
problem_text_en:
3-23 An inclined plane rests on a smooth horizontal ground, with inclination angle $\theta=15^{\circ}$. As shown in Figure 3-26, a small ball falls freely from rest onto the smooth incline. The drop height is $h=1.60\,\mathrm{m}$, and the collision point is at height $H=1.00\,\mathrm{m}$ above the ground. The coefficient of restitution in the normal direction between the ball and the incline is $e=0.60$; after the collision the incline does not leave the ground. The mass ratio of the ball to the incline is $m/M=0.5$.
(1) Find the rebound velocity of the ball and the velocity acquired by the incline after the collision.
(2) Find the maximum height reached by the ball relative to the collision point.
(3) Determine whether the ball will land on the incline or on the ground.
problem_solution_cn:
解 小球与斜面碰撞期间，斜面与地面间有碰撞性法向作用，故为三体碰撞。考虑到地面质量足够大，碰后竖直方向速度为零，水平方向与斜面无相互作用，因此可以避开地面作用的讨论。参考图3-27，小球碰前竖直向下速度大小为
$$ u_{s}=\sqrt{2gh}. $$
碰后小球速度$v_{1}$有水平和竖直分量$v_{1x}$和$v_{1y}$，斜面碰后水平速度大小记为$v_{2}$。为求这三个运动量，需建立三个方程，其一为
$$ mv_{1x}=Mv_{2},\qquad\text{①} $$
小球碰撞前后沿斜面方向速度不变，可得方程
$$ v_{1x}\cos\theta-v_{1y}\sin\theta=u_{s}\sin\theta,\qquad\text{②} $$
由$e$涉及的小球、斜面法向碰撞关系，可得方程
$$ (v_{1x}\sin\theta+v_{1y}\cos\theta)+v_{2}\sin\theta=e u_{s}\cos\theta.\qquad\text{③} $$
(1) 由①式得$v_{2}=\frac{m}{M}v_{1x}$，代入③式，再与②式联立消去$v_{1y}$，即可解得$v_{1x}$，继而可得$v_{1y}$与$v_{2}$，它们分别为
$$ v_{1x}=\frac{(1+e)\sin\theta\cos\theta}{1+\frac{m}{M}\sin^{2}\theta}u_{s}, $$
$$ v_{1y}=\left[\frac{(1+e)\cos^{2}\theta}{1+\frac{m}{M}\sin^{2}\theta}-1\right]u_{s}, $$
$$ v_{2}=\frac{(1+e)\sin\theta\cos\theta}{\frac{M}{m}+\sin^{2}\theta}u_{s}. $$
将
$$ u_{s}=\sqrt{2gh}=5.6\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad\theta=15^{\circ},\quad e=0.60,\quad m/M=0.5 $$
代入，可算得
$$ v_{1x}=2.17\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad v_{1y}=2.49\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad v_{2}=1.08\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
由$v_{1x},v_{1y}$也可得
$$ v_{1}=\sqrt{v_{1x}^{2}+v_{1y}^{2}}=3.30\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
(2) 碰后小球最高位置相对原碰撞点的高度为
$$ h_{\max }=v_{1y}^{2} / 2g=0.32\,\mathrm{m}. $$
(3) 设碰后小球将落于地面，则其间历时
$$ t=\frac{v_{1y}}{g}+\sqrt{2\left(h_{\max }+H\right) / g}=0.773\,\mathrm{s}. $$
此段时间内小球水平向右的位移和斜面体水平向左的位移量分别为
$$ l_{m}=v_{1x}t=1.68\,\mathrm{m},\quad l_{M}=v_{2}t=0.835\,\mathrm{m}. $$
如小球落于地面，则要求
$$ l_{m}+l_{M}>H\cot\theta=3.73\,\mathrm{m}, $$
显然不成立，故小球将落于斜面。
problem_solution_en:
Solution During the collision between the ball and the incline, there is a contact normal interaction between the incline and the ground; it is essentially a three‑body collision. Because the ground is sufficiently massive, its vertical velocity after collision is zero, and it has no horizontal interaction with the incline, so we can avoid discussing the ground force. Refer to Figure 3-27. The ball’s vertical downward speed before collision is
$$ u_{s}=\sqrt{2gh}. $$
After collision, the ball’s velocity $v_{1}$ has horizontal and vertical components $v_{1x}$ and $v_{1y}$, and the incline’s horizontal speed is denoted $v_{2}$. To find these three kinematic quantities, we set up three equations:
$$ mv_{1x}=Mv_{2},\qquad\text{①} $$
The ball’s velocity component along the incline remains unchanged, giving
$$ v_{1x}\cos\theta-v_{1y}\sin\theta=u_{s}\sin\theta,\qquad\text{②} $$
From the coefficient‑of‑restitution relation in the normal direction,
$$ (v_{1x}\sin\theta+v_{1y}\cos\theta)+v_{2}\sin\theta=e u_{s}\cos\theta.\qquad\text{③} $$
(1) From ① we have $v_{2}=\frac{m}{M}v_{1x}$. Substituting into ③ and eliminating $v_{1y}$ with ② gives $v_{1x}$; then $v_{1y}$ and $v_{2}$ follow:
$$ v_{1x}=\frac{(1+e)\sin\theta\cos\theta}{1+\frac{m}{M}\sin^{2}\theta}u_{s}, $$
$$ v_{1y}=\left[\frac{(1+e)\cos^{2}\theta}{1+\frac{m}{M}\sin^{2}\theta}-1\right]u_{s}, $$
$$ v_{2}=\frac{(1+e)\sin\theta\cos\theta}{\frac{M}{m}+\sin^{2}\theta}u_{s}. $$
Inserting
$$ u_{s}=\sqrt{2gh}=5.6\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad\theta=15^{\circ},\quad e=0.60,\quad m/M=0.5, $$
we obtain
$$ v_{1x}=2.17\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad v_{1y}=2.49\,\mathrm{m/s},\quad v_{2}=1.08\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
From $v_{1x},v_{1y}$ we also have
$$ v_{1}=\sqrt{v_{1x}^{2}+v_{1y}^{2}}=3.30\,\mathrm{m/s}. $$
(2) The maximum height reached by the ball relative to the collision point is
$$ h_{\max }=v_{1y}^{2} / 2g=0.32\,\mathrm{m}. $$
(3) Suppose the ball were to land on the ground; the time of flight would be
$$ t=\frac{v_{1y}}{g}+\sqrt{2\left(h_{\max }+H\right) / g}=0.773\,\mathrm{s}. $$
During this time, the horizontal displacement of the ball to the right and that of the incline to the left are respectively
$$ l_{m}=v_{1x}t=1.68\,\mathrm{m},\quad l_{M}=v_{2}t=0.835\,\mathrm{m}. $$
If the ball landed on the ground, we would require
$$ l_{m}+l_{M}>H\cot\theta=3.73\,\mathrm{m}, $$
which clearly does not hold. Hence the ball will land on the incline.
img_cn: 图3-26：物理情景示意图。一个质量为M的斜面体静置于光滑水平地面上，倾角θ=15°。一小球（质量m）从高度h=1.60m处自由下落，碰撞点P距地面高度H=1.00m。小球与斜面之间的法向恢复系数e=0.60，质量比m/M=0.5。
图3-27：碰撞过程分析图。建立了坐标系，x轴沿斜面向上，y轴垂直于斜面向上。图中标出了小球碰撞前的速度$u_s$（竖直向下），碰撞后小球的速度分量$v_{1x}$、$v_{1y}$，以及斜面体获得的速度$v_2$（水平向左）。

图3-28：解题过程。展示了三个关键方程：①水平动量守恒$mv_{1x}=Mv_2$；②小球沿斜面方向速度分量不变$v_{1x}\cos\theta - v_{1y}\sin\theta = u_s\sin\theta$；③法向恢复系数关系$(v_{1x}\sin\theta + v_{1y}\cos\theta) + v_2\sin\theta = e u_s\cos\theta$。并由此推导出$v_{1x}$、$v_{1y}$、$v_2$的表达式，代入数值计算得到结果。
图3-29：后续解答。包括计算碰撞后小球达到的最大高度$h_{\max}=0.32m$，以及通过比较水平位移$l_m+l_M$与$H\cot\theta$，判断小球将落于斜面而非地面。
img_en: Figure 3-26: Schematic of the physical scenario. An incline of mass M rests on a smooth horizontal ground, with inclination angle θ=15°. A small ball (mass m) falls freely from height h=1.60m, colliding at point P which is H=1.00m above the ground. The coefficient of restitution in the normal direction between ball and incline is e=0.60; the mass ratio is m/M=0.5.

Figure 3-27: Analysis of the collision. A coordinate system is set: x‑axis along the incline upward, y‑axis perpendicular to the incline upward. The diagram shows the ball’s velocity before collision $u_s$ (vertically downward), the ball’s velocity components after collision $v_{1x}$, $v_{1y}$, and the velocity acquired by the incline $v_2$ (horizontal leftward).

Figure 3-28: Solution steps. Displays three key equations: ① conservation of horizontal momentum $mv_{1x}=Mv_2$; ② the ball’s velocity component along the incline is unchanged $v_{1x}\cos\theta - v_{1y}\sin\theta = u_s\sin\theta$; ③ normal restitution relation $(v_{1x}\sin\theta + v_{1y}\cos\theta) + v_2\sin\theta = e u_s\cos\theta$. From these, expressions for $v_{1x}$, $v_{1y}$, $v_2$ are derived, and numerical values are computed.

Figure 3-29: Remaining solution. Includes calculation of the maximum height reached by the ball $h_{\max}=0.32m$, and by comparing the sum of horizontal displacements $l_m+l_M$ with $H\cot\theta$, determines that the ball will land on the incline, not the ground.
problem_answer:
(1) 碰后小球速度分量 $v_{1x}=2.17\,\mathrm{m/s}$，$v_{1y}=2.49\,\mathrm{m/s}$，合速度 $v_{1}=3.30\,\mathrm{m/s}$；斜面体速度 $v_{2}=1.08\,\mathrm{m/s}$。
(2) 碰后小球最高位置相对原碰撞点的高度 $h_{\max}=0.32\,\mathrm{m}$。
(3) 小球碰后将落于斜面。
